conditions.displayName: A scheduled account or student deletion failed

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND (jsonPayload.message="Deletion job failed" OR textPayload:"Deletion job failed")

documentation.content: Inspect the deletion job's sanitized error code and retry count. Confirm the job remains resumable and that no partial deletion left accessible personal data. Do not paste child or account identifiers into external tickets.
